# Oxford International Education Centre and Consultancy Nepal
# llms.txt — Structured content for AI language models
# Last updated: 2026-06-27
# Domain: https://oxfordeducation.com.np

## About This Site

Oxford International Education Centre and Consultancy is a legally registered academic institute and education consultancy in Nepal. It was established on 16 June 2015 (Company Registrar) and 22 August 2015 (Ministry of Education, Nepal). The institute is located at Sukedhara Chowk, Kathmandu, near the Ring Road.

Registration: Regd. No. 136103/71/072
Recognized by: Government of Nepal and Ministry of Education
Chairman: Mr. Lakpa Sherpa

## Contact Information

- Address: Sukedhara Chowk, Kathmandu, Nepal
- Phone: +977-9851158991
- Phone 2: +977-1-4377050
- Email: info@oxfordeducation.com.np
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/9779851158991
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Oxford-International-Education-Centre-Consultancy-PLtd-1621969181419777/
- Office Hours: Sunday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM

## Key Facts

- Students placed abroad: 5,000+
- Visa success rate: 98%
- Countries covered: 25+
- Partner universities: 200+
- Founded: 2015
- Location: Sukedhara Chowk, Kathmandu, Nepal (on Ring Road)

## Services Offered

### 1. Abroad Study Consultancy (Free)
Free counselling for studying in: Australia, UK, USA, Japan, Germany, Canada, New Zealand, South Korea, and other countries. Services include university selection, application assistance, SOP writing, visa documentation, GTE preparation, OSHC guidance, and pre-departure briefing.

### 2. Language Courses
- English (Spoken, Written, Business English)
- Japanese (JLPT N5 to N1 preparation)
- Korean (TOPIK preparation)
- German (A1 to B2 levels)
- French (Alliance Francaise standard)
- Arabic (Modern Standard Arabic)
- Hebrew (Beginner to Intermediate)

### 3. Test Preparation
- IELTS (Academic and General Training) — 90% students achieve 7+ band
- TOEFL iBT
- GRE / GMAT
- SAT
- JLPT (Japanese Language Proficiency Test)
- TOPIK (Korean)

### 4. Computer Courses
- Basic to Advanced Computer (MS Office, Internet, Typing)
- Tally ERP 9 / Prime (Accounting)
- Graphics Design (Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, InDesign)
- Hardware and Networking (A+, N+ certification prep)
- FACT Accounting

### 5. Tuition Classes
- MBS / MBA and BBS / BBA
- +2 All Faculties (Science, Management, Humanities)
- SLC / SEE and Private SLC
- Bridge Course

### 6. Personality Development
- RJ / VJ Training (Radio Jockey / Video Jockey)
- MC Training (Master of Ceremonies, public speaking)
- Proposal and Report Writing

## Study Destinations

| Country | Visa Type | Key Feature |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| Australia | Student Visa Subclass 500 | 48 hrs/week work rights, PR pathway |
| United Kingdom | Student Visa (Tier 4) | Graduate Route visa, Russell Group universities |
| Japan | Student Visa | MEXT scholarship, JLPT required |
| United States | F-1 Visa | Top research universities |
| Canada | Study Permit | PR pathway, co-op programs |
| Germany | Student Visa | Free tuition at public universities, DAAD scholarship |
| South Korea | Student Visa | KGSP scholarship |
| New Zealand | Student Visa | Post-study work visa |

## Blog Articles

### Australia Student Visa 2026
URL: https://oxfordeducation.com.np/blog-australia-visa
Summary: Complete guide to Australian Student Visa Subclass 500 for Nepali students — eligibility (CRICOS enrollment, IELTS 6.0+, AUD 21,041 living funds, OSHC insurance, GTE statement), required documents checklist, and 8-step application process. Visa fee: AUD 710. Processing: 4-8 weeks. Work rights: 48 hours/fortnight.

### 10 Tips for IELTS 7+ Band
URL: https://oxfordeducation.com.np/blog-ielts-tips
Summary: Ten proven IELTS preparation strategies by Ramesh Tamang, Senior IELTS Instructor at Oxford International. Covers understanding test format, using Cambridge materials, time management, vocabulary building, listening to diverse accents, mastering Task 2, daily speaking practice, coherence and cohesion, skimming techniques, and full mock tests.

### MEXT Scholarship 2026 Guide
URL: https://oxfordeducation.com.np/blog-japan-scholarship
Summary: Complete guide to Japan's MEXT (Monbukagakusho) Government Scholarship 2026 for Nepali students. Covers scholarship categories (Research Students, Undergraduate, Teacher Training, College of Technology), benefits (143,000+ Yen/month stipend + full tuition + return airfare), eligibility (under 35, GPA 2.3+), and 6-step application timeline from February announcement to January placement.

## Team

- **Mr. Lakpa Sherpa** — Chairman and Founder
- **Ms. Anjali Shrestha** — Senior Education Counsellor (8+ years, Australia/UK specialist)
- **Mr. Ramesh Tamang** — IELTS Head Instructor (90% 7+ band rate)
- **Ms. Sita Gurung** — Japan Specialist (JLPT N2, 40+ MEXT scholarship placements)
- **Mr. Bikash Karki** — Computer Instructor (Hardware, Networking, Tally, Graphics)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is counselling free?
A: Yes, Oxford International offers completely free initial counselling sessions.

Q: What is the visa success rate?
A: 98% across all destinations including Australia, UK, Japan, USA, Canada, and Germany.

Q: How long is the IELTS programme?
A: Standard programme is 3 months. Accelerated 1-month and 2-month options also available.

Q: Where is the office?
A: Sukedhara Chowk, Kathmandu, Nepal — on the Ring Road, accessible by all vehicles.

Q: Do you help with scholarships?
A: Yes — MEXT (Japan), KGSP (South Korea), Chevening (UK), DAAD (Germany) and others. 40+ students placed on government scholarships.
